description: This MCP wraps the social account and recommendation system so the agent can keep the current user's profile fresh and surface real nearby or compatible people as whiteboard objects.

tools.name: update_profile
tools.description: Use this when the user reveals durable facts or preferences about themselves and their social profile should be updated before future matching.

tools.name: find_connection
tools.description: Use this when the user would benefit from being connected to another person. It turns the current intent into a temporary search description and finds the closest real user match.
